description: [cut] - Remove sections from each line of files. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Extract the first field using colon as delimiter (get usernames)
commands.explanation: Executes the cut routine logically to process: extract the first field using colon as delimiter (get usernames)

commands.description: Extract characters 1 through 5 from each line
commands.explanation: Executes the cut routine logically to process: extract characters 1 through 5 from each line
Executes the cut routine logically to process: extract fields 2 through 4 (tab delimited default)
